scene.message: {nl}
people's rumors.{waitkey}{nl} That's your bad habit, Tomomi!
{ret}
Tomomi: I envy you, Saeko...{waitkey}{nl} You're so strong...{waitkey}{ret}
Tomomi: Y-{wait_fr:30}you're right.{waitkey}{ret}
Tomomi: Eh!?
Fooled, you say?{waitkey}{ret}
Tomomi: ......{waitkey}{ret}
Tomomi: ......uh...{wait_fr:30} you...{nl} {wait_fr:30}...are...
...{waitkey}{ret}
Saeko: What?{nl} I can't hear you!{waitkey}{ret}
Tomomi: You
